title: PHP JSON Encoding and Decoding
codeExample:
1, "name" => "Alice", "email" => "alice@example.com", "roles" => ["admin", "editor"], "active" => true, "metadata" => [ "last_login" => "2026-07-10", "login_count" => 42 ] ]; $json = json_encode($user, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE); echo "
$json
"; // JSON decode $jsonString = '{"products":[{"id":1,"name":"Laptop","price":999},{"id":2,"name":"Phone","price":699}]}'; $products = json_decode($jsonString, true); foreach ($products["products"] as $product) { echo $product["name"] . ": $" . $product["price"] . "
"; } // API response example $response = [ "status" => "success", "data" => ["user_id" => 123, "token" => "abc123"], "timestamp" => time() ]; header("Content-Type: application/json"); echo json_encode($response); ?>

quiz.question: Which function converts a PHP array to JSON?
What does the second parameter true do in json_decode()?
